description: React rendering invariants on top of the typescript pack: untrusted HTML goes through one sanitize pipeline, no script-scheme URLs.

rules.message: dangerouslySetInnerHTML with an inline-built value and no sanitize call — wrap the expression in DOMPurify.sanitize(...) (or your sanitizer), or assign the sanitized result to a variable first (bare identifiers are not flagged)
javascript: URL in href — script-injection sink; use an onClick handler or a real URL
